description: Main branch protection rules for roadmap governance enforcement

rationale.requirePullRequestReviews: Human review gate catches logic errors and design issues missed by automation
rationale.requiredStatusChecks: All CI gates must pass: typecheck, DAG integrity, tests, promotion evidence
rationale.requireBranchesToBeUpToDate: Prevent merge conflicts and ensure CI ran on the final state
rationale.allowForcePushes: Main is canonical; history must be immutable for audit trail

activation.instruction: Apply via GitHub > Settings > Branches > main > Add Rule

gates_description.gitsha-completion-gate: Git commit validation for completion records
gates_description.surface-guard: Public API surface validation (npm run check:surface)
gates_description.promotion-ledger: Governance evidence collection and ledger generation
